comment: Really really helpful.
im scared
I can’t believe how much I learned in one video!
You just turned a difficult topic into something exciting!
This video is sadly beyond the scope of this video.

Whenever I see these kinds of videos it makes me wonder why some of these are even being taught.

Really you only need:
NB - good for NLP and cheap to compute
Linear regression - good baseline
Boosters - what is almost always the best to use
GLM/GAMs - these are never taught for some reason, they're used a lot in insurance
SVM/SVC - very niche case where sometimes you'll use it for embeddings
Cosine similiarity - not taught in depth nearly enough, even though it's just correlation.

Everything else is a waste of time to learn.  It's like at once point someone came up with a list (that excluded generalized linear models) and it's just been repeated and taught to others and never refined.  One person at one points taught others, and they've just been repeating it since without putting any thought into it.  Plus what's worse is they test others on whether they've learned the same useless things, even though they've never used it in prod.
